testcase.name: test_approve_then_double_approve_409
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_phase2.py:88: in req_id assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"literal_error","loc":["body","priority"],"msg":"Input should be 'routine', 'urgent' or 'stat'","input":"high","ctx":{"expected":"'routine', 'urgent' or 'stat'"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/literal_error"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_reject_after_approve_409
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_phase2.py:88: in req_id assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"literal_error","loc":["body","priority"],"msg":"Input should be 'routine', 'urgent' or 'stat'","input":"high","ctx":{"expected":"'routine', 'urgent' or 'stat'"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/literal_error"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_receive_on_pending_400_or_409
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase2.py:113: in test_receive_on_pending_400_or_409 new_id = r.json()["id"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'id'
